description: PR2 scenario #5 — no feasible room anywhere. A 200-student section is required but no room in the entire pool has enough capacity even before buffer is applied. Expected reason: NO_ROOM_CAPACITY.
notes: This is the 'real' capacity shortage — no amount of slot reshuffling helps because no room is big enough. Distinct from ROOM_OCCUPIED (slot-level) and ROOM_BUFFER_REJECT (just the buffer margin).

Today the autoplace scorer returns best_option=None (site 1) or falls through to site 2; no room-size reason is captured. PR2 surfaces it as NO_ROOM_CAPACITY with the needed/best_capacity context so registrars can see 'biggest room is 40 but you need 220 with buffer'.
